connection_request: Hi there — I work with private equity groups actively acquiring manufacturing businesses in NV. Would love to connect and share what we're seeing in the market.
inmail:
Hi there,

I hope this finds you well. My name is Jordi Quevedo-Valls — I'm a business broker who works exclusively with serious, pre-qualified buyers looking to acquire manufacturing businesses.

I came across Vegas Valley Ironworks and I'm reaching out because we currently represent a buyer specifically looking for manufacturing operations in NV with your profile — they're capitalized, experienced, and ready to move.

I want to be upfront: I'm not here to pressure you into anything. A lot of business owners I connect with aren't actively looking to sell, but are open to understanding what their business is worth in today's market — especially with PE multiples where they are right now.

If you're at all curious about:
• What your business might be worth today
• What a sale/transition could look like
• Whether there's a buyer who'd be the right fit

I'd love to have a 15-minute confidential call.

Would you be open to a quick conversation this week?

Best,
Jordi Quevedo-Valls
Valar Brokers

connection_request: Hi there — I work with private equity groups actively acquiring manufacturing businesses in WY. Would love to connect and share what we're seeing in the market.
inmail:
Hi there,

I hope this finds you well. My name is Jordi Quevedo-Valls — I'm a business broker who works exclusively with serious, pre-qualified buyers looking to acquire manufacturing businesses.

I came across Wyoming All Service and I'm reaching out because we currently represent a buyer specifically looking for manufacturing operations in WY with your profile — they're capitalized, experienced, and ready to move.

I want to be upfront: I'm not here to pressure you into anything. A lot of business owners I connect with aren't actively looking to sell, but are open to understanding what their business is worth in today's market — especially with PE multiples where they are right now.

If you're at all curious about:
• What your business might be worth today
• What a sale/transition could look like
• Whether there's a buyer who'd be the right fit

I'd love to have a 15-minute confidential call.

Would you be open to a quick conversation this week?

Best,
Jordi Quevedo-Valls
Valar Brokers
